zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thake於1571年8月11日出生在英國賀特福爾巴克萊時，他的父親Richard Thake GG 11LT21歲，母親Margaret Tipping11568歲。他於1597年1月4日與Joane Wood在英國賀特福爾羅伊斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年10月25日在英國賀特福爾巴可瓦享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴可瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Thake于1571年8月11日出生在英国賀特福爾巴克萊时，他的父亲Richard Thake GG 11LT21岁，母亲Margaret Tipping11568岁。他于1597年1月4日与Joane Wood在英国賀特福爾羅伊斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1630年10月25日在英国賀特福爾巴可瓦享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾巴可瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Thake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Thake was born on 11 August 1571, in Barley, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Richard Thake GG 11LT, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Tipping, was 11568. He married Joane Wood on 4 January 1597, in Royston, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 25 October 1630, in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Thake est né le 11 août 1571, à Barley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Thake GG 11LT, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tipping, avait 11568 ans. Il a épousé Joane Wood le 4 janvier 1597, à Royston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1630, à Barkway, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Barkway, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Thake am 11. August 1571 in Barley, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Thake GG 11LT 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Tipping 11568. Er hat am 4. Januar 1597 in Royston, Hertfordshire, England Joane Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1630 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Thake è nato il il 11 agosto 1571 nel Barley, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Thake GG 11LT, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Tipping, aveva 11568 anni. Lui sposato Joane Wood il 4 gennaio 1597, nel Royston, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1630, nel Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thakeが1571年8月11日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーリーで生まれた時，父Richard Thake GG 11LTは21歳，母Margaret Tippingは11568歳であった。1597年1月4日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアロイストンでJoane Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年10月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークワイで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークワイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Thake(이)가 1571년 8월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 발리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Thake GG 11LT(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Tipping(은)는 11568세였다. 그는 1597년 1월 4일 영국 허트퍼드실르 로이스턴에서 Joane Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 10월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 바k웨이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 바k웨이에 묻혔다.

pt.11 August 1571–25 October 1630: 11 de agosto de 1571–25 de outubro de 1630
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Thake nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1571, em Barley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Thake GG 11LT, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Tipping, tinha 11568 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Wood em 4 de janeiro de 1597, em Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1630, em Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thake родился 11 августа 1571 г. в местности барли, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Thake GG 11LT было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Tipping, 11568. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Wood 4 января 1597 г. в местности роистон, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 25 октября 1630 г. в местности барквеи, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности барквеи, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joane Wood el 4 de enero de 1597, en Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
